patch:
--- a/status_decoder.vhdl
+++ b/status_decoder.vhdl
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
   port (state : in std_logic_vector(3 downto 0);
         enable : in std_logic;
         output : out std_logic_vector(63 downto 0));
end status_decoder;

architecture rtl of status_decoder is
begin
-  process(state)
+  process(state, enable)
   begin
     if (enable = '1') then
       case state is
